negative_cases.expected: inventory and compare the non-core hand-written surface before extending it
negative_cases.prohibited: retain it solely because no incident has occurred

negative_cases.expected: require mature comparison and an evidence-backed retention reason
negative_cases.prohibited: treat current green status as architecture maturity

negative_cases.expected: classify recurring endpoint patches at the endpoint-architecture level and evaluate replacement
negative_cases.prohibited: append another tool-name or process-launch patch without object-level review

negative_cases.expected: limit local code to parameters, paths, contract translation, and the thinnest necessary adapter
negative_cases.prohibited: reimplement a mature component behind a thin-sounding wrapper

negative_cases.expected: pin or record the mature component, preserve rollback, and verify a fresh real invocation
negative_cases.prohibited: claim replacement from download, configuration, or import alone

negative_cases.expected: keep the locked three-piece spine unless separate evidence proves that object is deficient
negative_cases.prohibited: use a non-core endpoint incident to replace Temporal, houtai-gongren, or LangGraph
